news-global-econ.title: Mark Levin: To say war violates God's word is simply not the case | Fox News Video
news-global-econ.description: Fox News host Mark Levin explores the concept of 'just war' across faiths on 'Life, Liberty & Levin.'

news-global-econ.title: Distress call captures tanker under fire, Iran shuts Hormuz trapping thousands of sailors
news-global-econ.description: Hundreds of oil tankers are stranded at the Strait of Hormuz after Iran shut the chokepoint, with crews reporting gunfire and traumatic experiences.

news-global-econ.title: We Have To Be Very Careful About Our Agenda With Iran, Victor Davis Hanson Argues
news-global-econ.description: Hoover Institution senior fellow Victor Davis Hanson reviews the many players who would be involved in a potential resolution to the conflict with Iran on ‘Life, Liberty & Levin.’

news-global-econ.title: Slain Iranian nuclear scientists raises alarm over uranium, expertise reaching black market
news-global-econ.description: The killing of Iranian nuclear scientists in U.S.-Israeli strikes raises fears over nuclear proliferation as experts warn of weakened material controls.

news-global-econ.title: Waltz: Iran Claiming Ownership of Strait of Hormuz a 'Violation of International Law'
news-global-econ.description:
On Sunday, on NBC's "Meet the Press," U.S. Ambassador to the United Nations Mike Waltz said the Strait of Hormuz was an international waterway, thus Iran's claim of ownership "is a violation of international law."

news-global-soc.description: Hundreds of oil tankers are stranded at the Strait of Hormuz after Iran shut the chokepoint, with crews reporting gunfire and traumatic experiences.

news-global-soc.title: Barack and Michelle Obama's film production company reportedly leaving Netflix to go independent
news-global-soc.description: The Obamas' film production company Higher Ground is reportedly moving away from Netflix to become independent when its current deal expires later this year.

news-global-soc.title: The Strokes end Coachella weekend two set with politically charged video targeting CIA and US government
news-global-soc.description: The Strokes appeared to take aim at the U.S. government during Coachella, closing their set with a video referencing the CIA, Gaza and Iran bombings.

news-global-soc.title: Survey finds nearly one-third of Long Island residents say Jews should 'move on' from the Holocaust
news-global-soc.description: A new survey of Long Islanders finds nearly one-third of residents believe Holocaust education should not be mandatory and Jewish people should "move on."

news-global-soc.title: NYU Students Streak in Their Skivvies to Protest College Merch
news-global-soc.description:
New York University students put a new twist on the old practice of “streaking” as a group of them showed up nearly naked to protest their school’s high-priced merchandise and call attention to “worker’s rights.”
